'''Gale''' was an icy [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located within the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Situated in the [[Star system/Legends|star system's]] ninth [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and the eight planet, it was named for [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Gale]], who fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]]. Gale was orbited by two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].
